Title: Minimalist Crescent Moon and Plant Line Art Icon
Description:
This elegant line art design features a delicate crescent moon framing a potted plant. Perfect for adding a touch of natural, minimalist aesthetic to any project.

Whether used for spiritual branding, wellness blogs, nature-themed decor, or a modern logo, this icon conveys peace, growth, and cycles.

  • Versatile Usage: Ideal for tattooing, stickers, digital branding, stationery, or screen printing.
  • Style: Modern, simple, and highly customizable.
  • Meaning: Symbolizes cycles of nature, renewal, and delicate beauty.

Use this timeless emblem to enhance your brand identity or personalize your cherished gifts.
